name: Obsidian-like knowledge graph
objective: Interactive Obsidian-like knowledge map of the KB — documents as nodes, links/tags as edges — rendered client-side on the static GitHub Pages site.

review.note: Full-phase revalidation green (clean pinned build, smoke guard, determinism, serve parity); objective + constraints conform; 7 doc versions consolidated. Owed: operator browser visual QA post-deploy.
